sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '1992-09-20');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (2, DATE '2000-01-01');
SELECT id, date_part('year', event_date) AS event_year FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '1995-12-31' WHERE id = 1;
